Name: DAMAGE_DEAD_MOTION_WEIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines weighting values used to determine death animations or death reaction behavior based on attack size or impact category.

Fields.Name: None
Fields.Description: Weight value used when no attack size category is applied.

Fields.Name: Extremely Small
Fields.Description: Weight value used for extremely small attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Small
Fields.Description: Weight value used for small attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Medium
Fields.Description: Weight value used for standard or medium attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Large
Fields.Description: Weight value used for large attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Very Large
Fields.Description: Weight value used for very large attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Extremely Large
Fields.Description: Weight value used for extremely large attack impact categories.

Fields.Name: Massive
Fields.Description: Weight value used for the largest attack impact categories.
